functions.insertText:
set(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME Generic)
set(CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR arm)

set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER arm-none-eabi-gcc)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER arm-none-eabi-g++)
set(CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER arm-none-eabi-gcc)
set(CMAKE_OBJCOPY arm-none-eabi-objcopy)
set(CMAKE_SIZE arm-none-eabi-size)

set(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE_TARGET_TYPE STATIC_LIBRARY)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_INIT "-mcpu={{cpu}} -mthumb")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_INIT "-mcpu={{cpu}} -mthumb")

functions.name: GitHub Actions CMake CI skeleton
functions.insertText:
name: build-and-test

on:
  push:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: {{runner}}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Configure
        run: cmake -S . -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE={{buildType}}
      - name: Build
        run: cmake --build build --parallel
      - name: Test
        run: ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure

stages:
  - build
  - test

build:
  stage: build
  image: {{image}}
  script:
    - cmake -S . -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE={{buildType}}
    - cmake --build build --parallel
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/

test:
  stage: test
  image: {{image}}
  script:
    - ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure

[binaries]

endian = 'little'
